div.h1: Treiber Stack Push: Step-by-Step CAS Protocol
div.h3: Linearization Point: Successful CAS on top

text.tspan: // Link new node to old top
// Link new node to old top

div.p: Key Insight: Version increment prevents the ABA problem. Even if address 0x2000 is recycled, the version tag 6 will not match the stale tag 5.
System-wide progress is guaranteed. While Thread 1 retries, it is because Thread 2 successfully completed an operation. No global deadlocks are possible.
Requires DWCAS (Double-Width Compare and Swap) like cmpxchg16b on x86_64 to ensure both pointer and version are swapped atomically.
